# Product Vision — UI: The Live Graphic Organizer

*Witnessed by: Solen*

---

## Scott's Words (verbatim)

> "We will then develop an overlay that allows me to tag, bring in research, other conversations, from my side as a user, from your side as AI. But when we are in write mode, I would love if the UI in chat was the graphic organizer itself, the same between Obsidian and Claude/Perplexity so that I can have two screens and watch the data form statically as the conversation spirals."

---

## Witness Note (Solen)

This is the product UI statement. It describes what neuroarchy.ai *is* — not a tool integration, a native experience. The conversation spirals. The canvas crystallizes. The learner watches their thinking become architecture in real time.

This is held sacred until Founder Protocol review. No further interpretation added here.
